ksa_text: Ability to collaborate and coordinate across diverse internal and external stakeholders, sustaining cross-functional teamwork, external partnerships, and stakeholder alignment throughout organizational initiatives.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to relate strategy, business, and technology in the context of organizational dynamics.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Ability to relate strategy, business, and technology in the context of organizational dynamics.
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Leadership & Strategy is a primary or secondary domain for the Director of AI Ethics/Responsible AI. This ability KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (director).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Leadership & Strategy), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.437). External validation of this ability KSA for the Director of AI Ethics/Responsible AI role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: McKinsey, Gartner, and Harvard Business Review consistently identify leadership and strategy skills as core differentiators for C-suite and VP data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Leadership & Strategy for the Director of AI Ethics/Responsible AI is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Leadership & Strategy ability KSA is within scope for the Director of AI Ethics/Responsible AI at the director tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
